briefs.title: BC PST Exemption Rules Amended: Two Sections Repealed and Minor Wording Fix Applied
briefs.summary: BC updated its Provincial Sales Tax (PST) rules by removing two sections from the PST Regulation and fixing a typo ('Barnlitter' corrected to 'Barn litter') in a product classification table.
briefs.action_required: Check if your business relied on PST Regulation sections 45 or 46 — those rules are now removed.
